title: One planned week in the life of Mario Rossi

parameters.sourceNote: Illustrative input. It must pass deterministic validation before execution.

context.narrativeIntent: Normal Monday with grocery shopping, work-shirt laundry and an evening walk because supplies are low and the weather is dry.
Normal Tuesday with a phone call to Mario's mother; the outdoor walk has an explicit indoor alternative because rain is expected.
A stable Wednesday work routine followed by a pharmacy stop, a call with Mario's sister and a home-cooked dinner.
A routine Thursday with a small household errand, ironing and a quiet evening at home.
Friday follows the work routine but includes an evening aperitivo with Paolo and a later, lighter dinner and bedtime.
Saturday starts later, includes household cleaning and a neighborhood market, then an afternoon and dinner visit with Mario's mother.
A quiet Sunday with a long walk, laundry, weekly meal preparation and preparation for Monday, while retaining enough leisure and rest.

attributes.note: If selected by the seeded event generator, Mario dismisses the first alarm.
